title: CommentTrustConfig
description: Workspace-level config at .agency/comment-trust.yaml. Widens the default author_association allowlist for CONTEXT ingestion surfaces (clarify-resume, pr-feedback) only. The clarify answer-scanner is pinned to the hard default (OWNER/MEMBER/COLLABORATOR + cluster bot) regardless of this config.

widen.description: Additive allowlist entries. Never removes default-trusted tiers (OWNER/MEMBER/COLLABORATOR). Applies to context surfaces only.

tiers.description: GitHub author_association tiers to treat as trusted on context surfaces. Common: CONTRIBUTOR.

logins.description: Specific GitHub logins to treat as trusted on context surfaces regardless of tier.
